environment_prompt: A white desk surface with a white cable and a crumpled brown paper bag in the background, simple and clean desk environment with minimal clutter, soft indoor lighting, neutral tones. The foil wrapper of the gum package conceals a milky white gum stick inside that becomes visible when unwrapped.
perspective_prompt: First-person point of view looking down at the desk, right hand visible holding a small rectangular silver foil-wrapped mint gum package, close-up perspective focused on the hand and the package.

interactions.action: The viewer flips the gum package over to its other side and then flips it back.
The viewer unwraps the foil packaging, revealing the milky white gum stick inside.
